title: Spicy Russian Jelly Bake
description: A sweet and spicy dessert that combines Russian flavors with a glassy texture. Perfect for a unique dessert experience.

ingredients.name: Glassy sugar
ingredients.notes: use a glass jar to store the sugar

ingredients.name: Sherry
ingredients.notes: a dry sherry pairs well with spicy flavors

ingredients.name: Bake
ingredients.notes: ground bake adds texture to the jelly

ingredients.name: Lemon zest
ingredients.notes: adds a hint of citrus to the jelly

ingredients.name: Vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: enhances the flavor of the sherry

instructions: Mix the Spicy Russian Jelly, glassy sugar, sherry, bake, lemon zest, and vanilla extract in a bowl.
Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form, then fold them into the jelly mixture.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the jelly is set.
Remove the jelly from the oven and let it cool completely.
Once cooled, refrigerate the jelly for at least 2 hours before serving.
Slice the jelly into squares and serve chilled.
